translation.literal_translation: And not the Smrti-based one, because attributes not belonging to it are spoken. (19)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.2.19: Smrti-Pradhana is excluded as antaryamin since the passage attributes non-Pradhana properties.
translation.interpretive_note: Sutra compression of the ataddharma criterion.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Curated in contiguous S02 pass with stable cadence and inferential-tag schema.
A later philological pass should revisit antaryamin and akshara-bhuta-yoni terminology in records 1.2.047-1.2.054.
